ddls:
CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "slice_name" TEXT /* Name of the slice associated with the group */,
  "alias" TEXT /* Alias for the group if applicable */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label for the group */,
  "min" INTEGER /* Minimum number of members in the group */,
  "max" INTEGER /* Maximum number of members in the group */,
  "must_support" INTEGER /* Indicates if the group must support certain features */,
  "is_modifier" INTEGER /* Indicates if the group can be modified */,
  "is_summary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the group is a summary */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user ID of the person who created the group */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date the group was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "meta_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the metadata entry */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the group this metadata is associated with */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the metadata was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the metadata was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the metadata */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* The user ID of the person who last updated the metadata */,
  "implicit_rules" TEXT /* Any implicit rules associated with the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meta_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "group_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the group to which the member belongs */,
  "member_name" TEXT /* Name of the member */,
  "member_type" TEXT /* Type of member (e.g., staff, facility) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the member joined the group */,
  "role" TEXT /* The role of the member within the group */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the member within the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_members_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characteristics" (
  "characteristic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each characteristic */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the group this characteristic belongs to */,
  "characteristic_name" TEXT /* Name of the characteristic */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the characteristic */,
  "characteristic_type" TEXT /* The type of characteristic */,
  "unit" TEXT /* The unit of measurement for the characteristic value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("characteristic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characteristics_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "constraints" (
  "constraint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each constraint */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the group this constraint applies to */,
  "constraint_type" TEXT /* Type of the constraint */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the constraint */,
  "constraint_status" TEXT /* The status of the constraint */,
  "enforcement_level" TEXT /* The level at which the constraint is enforced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("constraint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_constraints_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who has the permission */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group to which the permission applies */,
  "can_view" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user can view the group */,
  "can_modify" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user can modify the group */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* The level of permission */,
  "granted_by" INTEGER /* The user ID of the person who granted the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the group accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the group */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* The level of the log entry */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Any additional information about the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_logs_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the language entry */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the group this language is associated with */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* Language code (IETF format) */,
  "language_desc" TEXT /* Description of the language */,
  "language_status" TEXT /* The status of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_languages_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)
